Name: departments
SQL: SELECT "_subs"."result_id", "_fld_resp"."root" AS "result" FROM UNNEST($1::text[], $2::json[]) AS "_subs"("result_id", "result_vars") LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (SELECT json_build_object('departments', (SELECT coalesce(json_agg("_root"), '[]') AS "_root" FROM (WITH "_root.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "public"."departments") SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.base"."name" AS "name", "_root.r.files_aggregate"."files_aggregate" AS "files_aggregate") AS "_e")) AS "_root" FROM "_root.base" LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (WITH "_root.base" AS MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM "public"."department_files" WHERE "department_id" = "_root.base"."id") SELECT json_build_object('aggregate', (SELECT json_build_object('count', COUNT(*)) FROM "_root.base")) AS "files_aggregate") AS "_root.r.files_aggregate" ON ('true')) AS "_root")) AS "root") AS "_fld_resp" ON ('true')
